{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Gladstone Imperial Park
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gladstone Imperial Park]] is located across from the residence [[Maxwell]]'s family has owned for generations.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Gladstone Park is a location near where [[Rudeus Maxwell]]'s home was found.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
